title: ASR Outdoor Emergency Survival 5 Liter Water Flask Compact Portable
description:
These Survival Water Flasks are the only of their kind to meet rigorous test criteria for abrasion resistance and durability. Constructed of multi-layered laminated plastic film, these refillable flasks are ideal for camping, hiking, and everyday use. These flasks can withstand extreme heat, so you can even fill them with boiling water (making them great body warmers in cold situations. Each flask features a screw top cap and a flexible plastic body. The flask holds 5 liters and features a built in handle. Fill it up and use it to fill the smaller flask to bring along on a day hike. Ideal for any adventure, these flasks will keep your thirst quenched!

ASR Outdoor Emergency Survival 5 Liter Water Flask Compact Portable

These Survival Water Flasks are the only of their kind to meet rigorous test criteria for abrasion resistance and durability.

Key Features

  • BPA Free | Durable | Flexible
  • Dimensions: 12.5 x 12.5 x 4"
  • Attached plastic screw-top cap
  • Abrasion Resistant
  • 180 micron Large Top Opening - 1 inch

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRO-5LEF
  • UPC: 706569628876
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Large
